title: Skyweaver
description: this texture pack changes your sky
body:
This image shows a beautiful fantasy landscape above the clouds at sunset.

A soft purple and pink sky stretches across the horizon while the sun is setting, casting warm golden light through the clouds. Large floating islands hover in the air, covered with grass, rocks, and small buildings, giving the scene a magical and dreamlike feeling. Some islands are big and close, while others are smaller and farther away in the distance.

Below the islands, a thick sea of fluffy white clouds spreads out like an ocean. Several white birds are flying through the sky, adding movement and life to the scene.

The colors are very vibrant — purple, pink, orange, and blue blend together, creating a calm and mystical atmosphere. The image looks like a scene from a fantasy world or animated movie.
The sky only shines with Optifine
